description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.11.4 Docker image with two stages: test and publish. In the test stage add a code quality job that runs `npm install` then `npm run lint`; also add a test & coverage job that runs `npm it`, stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact and extracts coverage using the regex `/All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/`. In the publish stage add a package job that runs `npm pack` and publishes the generated *.tgz files as artifacts, but only on tag pipelines. Also add a publish job that runs on tags or triggers, writes an .npmrc file with the secret NPM_TOKEN, then runs `npm publish`, and sets the environment name to npm with URL https://www.npmjs.com/package/vue-app-env.
